author.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.author (
  id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_aaa.author_id_seq'::regclass),
  lastname character varying NOT NULL,
  firstname character varying NOT NULL,
  created_date timestamp without time zone,
  updated_date timestamp without time zone,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

foreignkeytestthingy.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.foreignkeytestthingy (
  id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_aaa.foreignkeytestthingy_id_seq'::regclass),
  thingyname character varying NOT NULL,
  gizmopickupaskey integer NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  deleted_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id),
  FOREIGN KEY (gizmopickupaskey) REFERENCES durc_aaa.foreignkeytestgizmo(id)
)

funnything.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.funnything (
  id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_aaa.funnything_id_seq'::regclass),
  thisint integer,
  thisfloat double precision,
  thisdecimal numeric DEFAULT NULL::numeric,
  thisvarchar character varying DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
  thisdate date,
  thisdatetime timestamp without time zone,
  thistimestamp timestamp without time zone,
  thischar character NOT NULL,
  thistext text NOT NULL,
  thisblob bytea,
  thistinyint smallint NOT NULL,
  thistinytext text NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

graphdata_nodetypetests.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.graphdata_nodetypetests (
  source_id character varying NOT NULL,
  source_name character varying NOT NULL,
  source_size integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  source_type character varying NOT NULL,
  source_group character varying NOT NULL,
  source_longitude numeric NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000000,
  source_latitude numeric NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000000,
  source_img character varying DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
  target_id character varying NOT NULL,
  target_name character varying NOT NULL,
  target_size integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  target_type character varying NOT NULL,
  target_group character varying NOT NULL,
  target_longitude numeric NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000000,
  target_latitude numeric NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000000,
  target_img character varying DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
  weight integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  link_type character varying NOT NULL,
  query_num integer NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (target_type, target_id, source_type, source_id)
)

magicField.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.magicField (
  id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_aaa."magicField_id_seq"'::regclass),
  editsome_markdown character varying NOT NULL,
  typesome_sql_code character varying NOT NULL,
  typesome_php_code text NOT NULL,
  typesome_python_code text NOT NULL,
  typesome_javascript_code character varying NOT NULL,
  this_datetime timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  this_date date NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  deleted_at timestamp without time zone,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

)

tags_report.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.tags_report (
  id bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_aaa.tags_report_id_seq'::regclass),
  field_to_bold_in_report_display character varying NOT NULL,
  field_to_hide_by_default character varying NOT NULL,
  field_to_italic_in_report_display character varying NOT NULL,
  field_to_right_align_in_report character varying NOT NULL,
  field_to_bolditalic_in_report_display character varying NOT NULL,
  numeric_field integer NOT NULL,
  decimal_field numeric NOT NULL,
  currency_field character varying NOT NULL,
  percent_field integer NOT NULL,
  url_field character varying NOT NULL,
  time_field time without time zone NOT NULL,
  date_field date NOT NULL,
  datetime_field timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

test_boolean.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.test_boolean (
  id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_aaa.test_boolean_id_seq'::regclass),
  label character varying NOT NULL,
  is_something character varying NOT NULL,
  has_something character varying NOT NULL,
  is_something2 smallint,
  has_something2 smallint,
  has_something3 boolean,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

test_created_only.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.test_created_only (
  id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_aaa.test_created_only_id_seq'::regclass),

  created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

column_data.default_value: 'Current timestamp not supported for date'::character varying

test_default_date.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.test_default_date (
  id integer NOT NULL,
  datetime_none timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  date_none date NOT NULL,
  datetime_current timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  date_current character varying DEFAULT 'Current timestamp not supported for date'::character varying,
  datetime_null timestamp without time zone,
  date_null date,
  datetime_defined timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT '2000-01-01 01:23:45'::timestamp without time zone,
  date_defined date NOT NULL DEFAULT '2000-01-01'::date,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

test_null_default.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_aaa.test_null_default (
  id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_aaa.test_null_default_id_seq'::regclass),
  null_var character varying DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
  non_null_var_def character varying NOT NULL,
  non_null_var_no_def character varying DEFAULT NULL::character varying,
  nullable_w_default character varying DEFAULT 'THIS IS THE DEFAULT'::character varying,
  non_null_default character varying NOT NULL DEFAULT 'I CANNOT BE NULL'::character varying,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

vote.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE durc_bbb.vote (
  id integer NOT NULL DEFAULT nextval('durc_bbb.vote_id_seq'::regclass),
  post_id integer NOT NULL,
  votenum character varying NOT NULL,
  updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)

endpoint.create_table_sql:
CREATE TABLE not_pointless.endpoint (
  id integer NOT NULL,
  endpoint_url text,
  domain_name text,
  created_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at timestamp without time zone DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (id)
)
